# Hypecia Connect Services Pvt Ltd
> https://hypeciaconnect.com

Hypecia Connect is a B2B infrastructure solutions company based in India, delivering carrier-grade telecom networks, AI-powered security and surveillance systems, green energy (solar) integration, industrial automation, and MEP engineering services.

## Company Facts
- Founded: 2022
- Headquarters: India
- Industry: Infrastructure, Telecom, Energy, Industrial Automation
- Key Client: Bharti Airtel (tier-1 telecom operator)

## Services
- **Telecom & IT Infrastructure**: Fiber optic networks, network equipment installation, data center cabling
- **Security & Surveillance**: AI-powered CCTV, access control, biometric systems
- **Green Energy Solutions**: Solar panel installation, energy audits, sustainable infrastructure
- **Industrial Automation**: PLC/SCADA systems, smart factory solutions
- **MEP Engineering**: Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing for commercial/industrial projects
- **ELV Systems**: Fire alarms, PA systems, structured cabling
- **Civil & Earthing Works**: Earthing solutions, civil construction
- **Manpower & Facility Services**: Skilled workforce deployment, facility management

## Notable Projects
- Deployed 2,400+ AI-enabled cameras across 157 Airtel MSC and TNG sites in Uttar Pradesh & Bihar
- Achieved 40% security improvement, 95% uptime, and 100% TRAI compliance
- End-to-end project management from site survey to commissioning
